event_title: Jaime Lannister kills King Aerys II Targaryen
reason: Pre-declared clean dyad: Jaime Lannister kills Aerys II Targaryen. Single agent + single victim, no instigator or ordering third party. Per D8 gate: do not reify.

Pre-declared clean dyad: Tyrion Lannister kills Tywin Lannister with a crossbow. Single agent + single victim, acting alone. Per D8 gate: do not reify. (Also: Tyrion strangles Shae is a separate clean dyad, same rule.)

Robb Stark is both the sole orderer and sole executor of the sentence — instigator equals executor, single victim, no separate commanding third party. This is a structurally clean dyad. The prior n-ary event (Karstark's murder of the Lannister hostages) is a distinct event node.
